title: janaador0827-commits/simulacra-forge
summary: Top Autonomous Multi-Agent Dialogue Systems for AI Character Emergence (2026)

title: jpoindexter/Vanta
summary: A local AI agent with a Rust safety kernel that gates every action — goal-aware, provider-agnostic, self-hosted. MIT.

title: strikersam/autonomous-ai-agency
summary: Autonomous AI Agent Infrastructure Platform — OpenAI-compatible AI gateway with MCP support, multi-agent orchestration, tool calling, observability, memory, RAG, AI workflows, and unified infrastructure for any LLM provider.

title: bug-ops/zeph
summary: A memory-first AI agent that remembers why decisions were made — not just the last message. Runs local (Ollama), cloud (Claude · OpenAI · Gemini), or decentralized TEE. Graph memory, self-learning skills, multi-model routing, sandboxed tools. MCP · ACP · A2A. One Rust binary.

title: YanCheng-go/my-focal-ai
summary: Personal news intelligence — aggregate AI content from curated sources, score with LLM, serve your own dashboard

title: Ramsbaby/jarvis
summary: Self-healing AI operations platform — Discord bot + RAG + Insight Layer + 99 automation scripts. Runs 24/7, fixes itself, gets smarter. Zero API charges.

title: shuwalker/ARES
summary: An open-source embodied AI operating system. Deploy a persistent intelligence with its own drives, voice, face, and presence. Built in public.

title: The-Focus-AI/umwelten
summary: CLI tool for evaluating and comparing AI models across Google, Ollama, OpenRouter, LM Studio, LlamaBarn, and GitHub Models. Features robust error handling, cost tracking, memory-augmented chat, and dynamic test coverage.

title: pdbethke/corralai
summary: One directive → a herd of AI agents that plan, build, verify, and re-plan across any model (local 7B to frontier) — human-gated, jail→repo, with shared memory + skills. Every mission recorded and replayable.

title: drplatforms/fitness-ai-platform
summary: Backend-driven AI health coaching platform with deterministic health logic, strict provider validation, local Ollama integration, and safe fallback behavior.

title: phuetz/code-buddy
summary: Open-source multi-provider AI coding agent — terminal + Electron desktop (Cowork) + 24/7 multi-AI fleet, free-first on local Ollama. Opt-in, human-gated evolutionary self-improvement that ingests research to set its own goals. 15 LLM providers (Claude, GPT, Gemini, Grok), ~110 tools, MCP, voice+vision companion.

title: homemade-software-inc/completion-kit
summary: Your prompts need tests too. Run prompts against real datasets, score outputs with LLM judges, version everything, and compare runs to see what got better.

title: ZANYANBU/aether
summary: A private, 100% local AI chat UI for everyone — works with any Ollama model (Qwen, Llama, Mistral, Gemma…). Text, vision & hands-free voice. Offline, no API keys, nothing leaves your device.

title: Keljian/JSE
summary: Local-first desktop assistant for the whole job hunt — scrape listings, match with a local LLM, generate applications in your own voice, and track everything on a Kanban board.

title: backupliton98-star/ai-commander-core
summary: Kodiqa-agent 2026 - Open Source AI Coding Agent with 7 Providers & 69 Commands

title: sookoothaii/IntelShed
summary: Spatial intelligence workstation — OSINT feeds, fusion analytics, local and cloud AI briefing, optional Pi edge sync

title: CorvinLabs/CorvinOS
summary: Self-hosted agentic OS — connects Claude Code, Codex or Hermes Agent to Discord, Telegram, WhatsApp, Slack & Email. EU AI Act 2026 & GDPR compliance by architecture.

title: kirankigi5/tokentriage
summary: TokenTriage is a local-first inference routing gateway for AI agents. It sits between apps and LLM providers, classifies each request, checks security and policy rules, routes to the cheapest sufficient model tier, verifies quality when needed, and records a full cost-saving receipt. The demo shows live routing traces, analytics, architecture

title: alialielkhayat246-a11y/Homzy
summary: Homzy - a bilingual (Arabic/English) AI property advisor that matches clients to real listings. Free, local-LLM powered (Ollama/Gemini). Contributions welcome.

title: NeuroverseOS/HowToSaveTheWorld
summary: A free, open-source leadership academy where your own AI is the instructor. 96 story-driven missions. No account, no tracking — your data stays yours. Fork it, load any curriculum, and AI will teach your course too.
